clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation within salience and emotion-processing networks to support the macro-level generation, representation, and regulation of subjective feeling states.
These terms map onto frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal systems that compute stimulus worth, encode incentives, and guide goal-directed action selection.
These terms converge functionally on the default mode network to subserve internally directed representations concerning personal identity, memory, and the attribution of mental states to others.
